query:
INSERT INTO ai_config (serviceName, model, temperature, maxTokens, systemPrompt) VALUES
('summarizer', 'default', 0.3, 2000, 'You are a document summarization AI.'),
('writer', 'default', 0.7, 3000, 'You are a professional writing assistant.'),
('recommendations', 'default', 0.5, 1500, 'You are a content recommendation engine.'),
('leadScoring', 'default', 0.2, 1000, 'You are a lead scoring analyst.'),
('semanticSearch', 'default', 0.3, 1500, 'You are a semantic search engine.'),
('autoTag', 'default', 0.3, 1000, 'You are a content classification AI.'),
('meetingNotes', 'default', 0.4, 3000, 'You are a meeting notes analyst.'),
('workflows', 'default', 0.5, 2000, 'You are a workflow automation designer.'),
('sentiment', 'default', 0.2, 1500, 'You are a sentiment analysis AI.')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE model=model;
